title: senecio palustris
intro: Senecio palustris, also known as Marsh Elder or Marsh Senecio, is a perennial herb native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. It is a member of the daisy family and is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and astringent properties. The health benefits of Senecio palustris include treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne, reducing inflammation and swelling, and acting as an antiseptic to promote wound healing. Senecio palustris can be prepared into herbal remedies like tinctures, infusions, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal benefits.
